title: Verify user can paginate through a multi-page data grid

steps.expected: A grid displays with rows and a pagination navigation region

steps.action: Observe the row headers of the grid
steps.expected: The grid has rowheaders named Name and Created

steps.action: Click the Page 2 link in the pagination navigation
steps.expected: The page advances to the next set of rows
The page returns to the prior set of rows
